# eFrogs Attestation

eFrogs Attestation is a Web3 application for creating on-chain ownership attestations for eFrogs NFTs on Linea using the Verax Attestation Registry.

- [Website](https://efrogs.alainnicolas.fr/)
- [Source code](https://github.com/alainncls/efrogs-attestation)
- [Verax portal](https://explorer.ver.ax/linea/portals/0x5f47bCeB43B8114cf85d3Ac50e9850164dE2984e)
- [Linea network](https://linea.build/)
- [Verax documentation](https://docs.ver.ax/)
